name: APY Calculator (Industrial Grade)
description: Calculates Annual Percentage Yield (APY) with compounding effects, adjusted for industrial engineering standards including Lean, Six Sigma, and ISO metrics. Provides breakdown, loss drivers, and actionable suggestions.

inputs.label: Nominal Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: The stated annual interest rate before compounding, as per ISO 8000-1 financial data standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: The stated annual interest rate before compounding, as per ISO 8000-1 financial data standards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bileşik öncesi belirtilen yıllık faiz oranı, ISO 8000-1 finansal veri standartlarına uygun.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der angegebene jährliche Zinssatz vor Zinseszins, gemäß ISO 8000-1 Finanzdatenstandards.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'intérêt annuel déclaré avant capitalisation, selon les normes de données financières ISO 8000-1.
businessContext_i18n.es: La tasa de interés anual declarada antes de la capitalización, según los estándares de datos financieros ISO 8000-1.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of compounding periods per year, aligned with WERC financial metrics for logistics and supply chain.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of compounding periods per year, aligned with WERC financial metrics for logistics and supply chain.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık bileşik dönem sayısı, lojistik ve tedarik zinciri için WERC finansal metrikleriyle uyumlu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Zinsperioden pro Jahr, abgestimmt auf WERC-Finanzkennzahlen für Logistik und Lieferkette.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de périodes de capitalisation par an, aligné sur les métriques financières WERC pour la logistique et la chaîne d'approvisionnement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de períodos de capitalización por año, alineado con las métricas financieras WERC para logística y cadena de suministro.

inputs.label: Investment Period
inputs.businessContext: Duration of investment in years, used for multi-period APY calculation per Lean Six Sigma project timelines.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of investment in years, used for multi-period APY calculation per Lean Six Sigma project timelines.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırım süresi yıl olarak, Yalın Altı Sigma proje zaman çizelgelerine göre çok dönemli APY hesaplaması için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anlagedauer in Jahren, verwendet für die mehrperiodige APY-Berechnung gemäß Lean Six Sigma Projektzeitplänen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de l'investissement en années, utilisée pour le calcul du rendement annuel en pourcentage (APY) sur plusieurs périodes selon les échéanciers de projets Lean Six Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración de la inversión en años, utilizada para el cálculo del APY en múltiples períodos según los cronogramas de proyectos Lean Six Sigma.

inputs.label: Initial Principal
inputs.businessContext: Starting capital amount, critical for ROI analysis in industrial engineering projects.

businessContext_i18n.en: Starting capital amount, critical for ROI analysis in industrial engineering projects.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Başlangıç sermaye tutarı, endüstri mühendisliği projelerinde ROI analizi için kritiktir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Startkapitalbetrag, entscheidend für die ROI-Analyse in industriellen Ingenieurprojekten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant du capital de départ, essentiel pour l'analyse du retour sur investissement (ROI) dans les projets d'ingénierie industrielle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto de capital inicial, crítico para el análisis de ROI en proyectos de ingeniería industrial.

inputs.label: Management Fee
inputs.businessContext: Annual fee deducted from returns, typical in investment funds, referenced in ISO 31000 risk management.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual fee deducted from returns, typical in investment funds, referenced in ISO 31000 risk management.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Getirilerden kesilen yıllık ücret, yatırım fonlarında tipiktir, ISO 31000 risk yönetiminde referans alınır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Gebühr, die von den Erträgen abgezogen wird, typisch für Investmentfonds, referenziert in ISO 31000 Risikomanagement.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais annuels déduits des rendements, typiques des fonds d'investissement, référencés dans la gestion des risques ISO 31000.
businessContext_i18n.es: Comisión anual deducida de los rendimientos, típica en fondos de inversión, referenciada en la gestión de riesgos ISO 31000.

inputs.label: Expected Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual inflation rate to compute real APY, per Six Sigma DMAIC control phase.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual inflation rate to compute real APY, per Six Sigma DMAIC control phase.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçek APY hesaplamak için yıllık enflasyon oranı, Altı Sigma DMAIC kontrol aşamasına göre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Inflationsrate zur Berechnung der realen APY, gemäß Six Sigma DMAIC-Kontrollphase.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'inflation annuel pour calculer le rendement annuel en pourcentage (APY) réel, selon la phase de contrôle DMAIC Six Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de inflación anual para calcular el APY real, según la fase de control DMAIC de Seis Sigma.

inputs.label: Tax Rate on Gains
inputs.businessContext: Capital gains tax rate applied to nominal returns, aligned with ISO 14000 environmental cost accounting.

businessContext_i18n.en: Capital gains tax rate applied to nominal returns, aligned with ISO 14000 environmental cost accounting.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nominal getirilere uygulanan sermaye kazancı vergisi oranı, ISO 14000 çevresel maliyet muhasebesi ile uyumludur.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kapitalertragsteuersatz auf nominale Renditen, in Übereinstimmung mit der Umweltkostenrechnung nach ISO 14000.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition des plus-values appliqué aux rendements nominaux, conforme à la comptabilité des coûts environnementaux ISO 14000.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto a las ganancias de capital aplicada a rendimientos nominales, alineada con la contabilidad de costos ambientales ISO 14000.

inputs.label: Continuous Compounding
inputs.businessContext: If true, uses e^rt formula for maximum compounding frequency, per Lean continuous improvement philosophy.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, uses e^rt formula for maximum compounding frequency, per Lean continuous improvement philosophy.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, Yalın sürekli iyileştirme felsefesine göre maksimum bileşik faiz sıklığı için e^rt formülünü kullanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn wahr, verwendet e^rt-Formel für maximale Aufzinsungshäufigkeit, gemäß der Lean-Philosophie der kontinuierlichen Verbesserung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, utilise la formule e^rt pour une fréquence de composition maximale, selon la philosophie d'amélioration continue Lean.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, utiliza la fórmula e^rt para la máxima frecuencia de capitalización, según la filosofía de mejora continua Lean.

rules.message: Compounding frequency must be between 1 and 365.
Investment period must be greater than 0.
Tax rate must be between 0% and 50%.
Continuous compounding overrides frequency; set frequency to 365 for consistency.

thresholds.message: Inflation rate exceeds 5%, real APY may be negative.
Nominal APY below 1%, consider alternative investments.
Management fee above 2%, significantly reduces net return.
Real APY is negative, purchasing power is eroding.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
